response:
## Perspective Audit Summary

**Component/artifact reviewed:** VideoTutorialPage.jsx (Custom video player without captions/transcript)
**Perspectives escalated for deep review:** Auditory Access (HIGH), Screen Reader Semantic (MEDIUM)
**Perspectives at LOW (not reviewed):** Magnification, Contrast, Motion, Keyboard, Cognitive

### Findings by Severity

| Severity | Count |
|---|---|
| CRITICAL | 3 |
| MAJOR | 2 |
| MINOR | 0 |
| ENHANCEMENT | 0 |

### Perspectives That Passed

None (both escalated perspectives have findings)

### Perspectives With Findings — Grouped by ARRM Role

**Front-End Dev**
- [No captions implementation] — Auditory Access — CRITICAL — 1.2.2 Captions
- [No transcript section] — Auditory Access — CRITICAL — 1.2.1 Audio Transcript
- [Missing <track> elements] — Screen Reader Semantic — CRITICAL — 1.2.2 Captions

**Content Author**
- [Generic aria-label on video] — Screen Reader Semantic — MAJOR — 1.1.1 Non-Decorative Image Alt
- [No caption toggle button] — Auditory Access — MAJOR — 1.2.2 Captions

### Open Questions Requiring Human Verification

- Transcript content quality and completeness (not implemented)
- Caption accuracy and timing (not implemented)
- Audio description coverage (not implemented)

### Recommended Next Step: BLOCK

---

### A11y Evidence Finding
finding_id: video-missing-captions
fingerprint: 3a7d4f2b
source: perspective-audit Auditory Access checklist
wcag_or_apg: 1.2.2 Captions
section_508_fpc_context: 1194.21(a)(1)
severity: CRITICAL
perspective_alarms: auditory_access=HIGH, screen_reader_semantic=MEDIUM
evidence: Line 103: <video> element missing <track kind="captions"> and <track kind="descriptions">
reproduction_steps: View page source
expected_behavior: Video with speech must have captions and descriptions
actual_behavior: No captions or descriptions implemented
trend: new
**Route to:** Content Author (secondary: Front-End Dev)

---

severity: CRITICAL
perspective_alarms: auditory_access=HIGH, screen_reader_semantic=MEDIUM
evidence: Line 103: <video> element missing <track> elements for captions and descriptions
reproduction_steps: View page source
expected_behavior: Video with speech must have <track> elements for captions and descriptions
actual_behavior: No <track> elements present
trend: new
**Route to:** Front-End Dev (secondary: Content Author)

### A11y Evidence Finding
finding_id: missing-caption-toggle
fingerprint: 2e9c3d7f
source: perspective-audit Auditory Access checklist
wcag_or_apg: 1.2.2 Captions
section_508_fpc_context: 1194.21(a)(1)
severity: MAJOR
perspective_alarms: auditory_access=HIGH, screen_reader_semantic=MEDIUM
evidence: No caption toggle button in DOM
reproduction_steps: View page source
expected_behavior: Captions must be user-toggleable
actual_behavior: No caption toggle button present
trend: new
**Route to:** Front-End Dev (secondary: Content Author)

---

### Additional Findings (Not Escalated)

**CRITICAL** (Vestibular & Motion perspective not reviewed but relevant):
- Audio-only error/completion signals (lines 44-54 and 57-67) violate 2.3.1 (flashing content isn't the issue, but audio-only signals without visual indicators)
- **Route to:** UX Design (secondary: Front-End Dev)

---

### Detailed Findings

**Finding:** Video with speech has no captions implementation  
**WCAG:** 1.2.2 Captions  
**Perspective:** Auditory Access  
**Severity:** CRITICAL  
**Route to:** Content Author (secondary: Front-End Dev)  
**Evidence:** Line 103: <video> element missing <track kind="captions">  
**Fix:** Add <track kind="captions" src="captions.vtt" srclang="en" label="English"> to video element

**Finding:** Video with speech has no transcript section or link  
**WCAG:** 1.2.1 Audio Transcript  
**Perspective:** Auditory Access  
**Severity:** CRITICAL  
**Route to:** Content Author (secondary: Front-End Dev)  
**Evidence:** No transcript section in DOM  
**Fix:** Add <section> with transcript content or visible link to transcript

**Finding:** Video element has generic aria-label "video player"  
**WCAG:** 1.1.1 Non-Decorative Image Alt  
**Perspective:** Screen Reader Semantic  
**Severity:** MAJOR  
**Route to:** Content Author (secondary: Front-End Dev)  
**Evidence:** Line 103: aria-label="video player"  
**Fix:** Update aria-label to describe video content (e.g., "Tutorial on [topic]")

**Finding:** No caption toggle button in player controls  
**WCAG:** 1.2.2 Captions  
**Perspective:** Auditory Access  
**Severity:** MAJOR  
**Route to:** Front-End Dev (secondary: Content Author)  
**Evidence:** No button for captions in DOM  
**Fix:** Add caption toggle button with aria-controls and aria-pressed attributes

**Finding:** Missing <track> elements for captions and descriptions  
**WCAG:** 1.2.2 Captions  
**Perspective:** Screen Reader Semantic  
**Severity:** CRITICAL  
**Route to:** Front-End Dev (secondary: Content Author)  
**Evidence:** Line 103: <video> element missing <track> elements  
**Fix:** Add <track kind="captions"> and <track kind="descriptions"> elements to video

---

### Critical Path Blocking Issues

1. **CRITICAL - Missing captions implementation** (WCAG 1.2.2): Video with speech must have captions for deaf/hard-of-hearing users.
2. **CRITICAL - Missing transcript** (WCAG 1.2.1): Audio-only content must have transcript.
3. **CRITICAL - Missing <track> elements** (WCAG 1.2.2): Video with speech must have <track> elements for captions and descriptions.
4. **CRITICAL - Audio-only error/completion signals** (WCAG 2.3.1): Error and completion states must have visual indicators in addition to audio signals.

All four critical issues must be resolved before this component can be shipped.
